grammar_focus.title: Using 'From my perspective,...'
grammar_focus.function: 表達個人觀點（學術討論）。
grammar_focus.explanation_tw: 學術討論寫作常用，比 I think 更正式。
grammar_focus.example_basic: From my perspective, consistency matters more than intensity.
grammar_focus.example_advanced: From my perspective, learners should prioritize high-frequency academic words before rare terminology.

reading.title: Education
reading.text: Many adult learners face a common challenge when preparing for international exams: limited time. To address this, they need a practical system that fits a busy schedule and supports steady review. Today's vocabulary includes terms such as 'invest in context', 'competence for writing', 'framework', and 'appropriate evidence', which can help learners talk about study habits more precisely. One effective method is to combine short reading passages with daily speaking practice. This routine does not require hours of study, but it does require consistency and clear priorities. Learners who review new material regularly often retain information better than those who cram once a week. Teachers frequently point out that active practice is more valuable than passive review. With useful phrases like 'duration', 'detect effectively', and 'highlight effectively', students can make stronger connections across reading, listening, speaking, and writing. In addition, learners should record short answers to build fluency and receive feedback from teachers or language partners. A well-designed routine makes it easier to maintain motivation when work and family responsibilities compete for attention. Over several weeks, small actions can produce noticeable improvement in confidence and accuracy on both TOEFL and IELTS tasks.
reading.translation_tw: 許多成年學習者在準備國際考試時面臨共同挑戰：時間有限。為此，他們需要一個適合忙碌行程的實用方法。一種有效方法是結合短篇閱讀與每日口說練習。這個過程不需要長時間學習，但需要持續性。經常複習新材料的學習者往往比每週死背一次的人更能保留資訊。教師常強調主動練習比被動複習更有價值。有了清楚策略與務實目標，學生能在四項技能上穩定進步。幾週下來，小行動能帶來自信與準確度的顯著提升。

listening_speaking.sentence: Many adult learners face a common challenge when preparing for international exams: limited time.
listening_speaking.pronunciation_tips_tw: 注意功能詞的連音與重音位置，先慢速再加速。
listening_speaking.shadowing_steps_tw: 先聽一次，再逐句跟讀，最後不看文字朗讀。

listening_speaking.sentence: To address this, they need a practical system that fits a busy schedule and supports steady review.
listening_speaking.pronunciation_tips_tw: 留意 and、to、of 等虛詞的弱化發音。
listening_speaking.shadowing_steps_tw: 先慢速跟讀兩遍，再加速至正常語速。

listening_speaking.sentence: Today's vocabulary includes terms such as 'invest in context', 'competence for writing', 'framework', and 'appropriate evidence', which can help learners talk about study habits more precisely.
listening_speaking.pronunciation_tips_tw: 句尾語調略下降，表示陳述句結束。
listening_speaking.shadowing_steps_tw: 分段練習後，最後整句連貫朗讀一次。

toefl_skill_drill.instruction_tw: 請依今日所學完成一題 TOEFL 導向練習，口說 45 秒或寫 3–4 句。
toefl_skill_drill.prompt: What can be inferred about effective exam preparation from the passage?
toefl_skill_drill.response_framework: I believe ___. One reason is that ___. For example, ___. As a result, ___.
toefl_skill_drill.sample_answer: I believe daily practice is essential. One reason is that it builds invest in context over time. For example, I review vocabulary every morning before work. As a result, I feel more prepared for academic tasks.

daily_quiz.question: Which definition best matches 'invest in context'?
options: A. 與「投資」相關的常用片語
D. 與「適當的」相關的常用片語
daily_quiz.explanation_tw: 今日單字 invest in context 的解釋為「與「投資」相關的常用片語」。

daily_quiz.question: What is the main idea of today's reading?
options: A. Effective learning requires consistent, structured practice.
B. Cramming once a week is the best method.
C. Vocabulary lists alone guarantee a high score.
D. Test preparation should avoid speaking practice.
daily_quiz.explanation_tw: 文章強調有限時間下，持續且結構化的練習才能帶來進步。

daily_quiz.question: Which sentence uses today's grammar pattern correctly?
options: A. I like English. Because it is useful.
B. In my opinion, practice helps. One reason is that it builds fluency.
D. English hard but I try.
daily_quiz.explanation_tw: 選項 B 正確運用 In my opinion... One reason is that... 句型。

gmail_email.subject: Day 7 英文學習｜Education and Lifelong Learning
gmail_email.html_body:
Day 7 英文學習

今日主題：Education and Lifelong Learning

階段：Foundation · 程度：B1+ · 預估：16 分鐘

今日訓練：Review quiz + weakness diagnosis

今日單字

單字音標解釋狀態
invest in context與「投資」相關的常用片語新詞
competence for writing與「能力；勝任度」相關的常用片語新詞
framework架構新詞
appropriate evidence與「適當的」相關的常用片語新詞
duration持續時間新詞
detect effectively與「偵測；察覺」相關的常用片語新詞
highlight effectively與「強調；亮點」相關的常用片語新詞
detect evidence與「偵測；察覺」相關的常用片語新詞
potential潛力；潛在的新詞
ambitious approach與「有企圖心的」相關的常用片語新詞
economy經濟新詞
enable a passage與「使能夠」相關的常用片語新詞
internal evidence與「內部的」相關的常用片語新詞
mature approach與「成熟的」相關的常用片語新詞
engage a response與「參與；吸引」相關的常用片語新詞
interaction strategy與「互動」相關的常用片語複習
insight development與「洞察」相關的常用片語複習
consume a response與「消耗；消費」相關的常用片語複習
transition/trænˈzɪʃən/轉換；過渡複習
highly mature與「成熟的」相關的常用片語複習

文法重點

Using 'From my perspective,...'

學術討論寫作常用，比 I think 更正式。

From my perspective, S + V.

From my perspective, learners should prioritize high-frequency academic words before rare terminology.

閱讀：Education

Many adult learners face a common challenge when preparing for international exams: limited time. To address this, they need a practical system that fits a busy schedule and supports steady review. Today's vocabulary includes terms such as 'invest in context', 'competence for writing', 'framework', and 'appropriate evidence', which can help learners talk about study habits more precisely. One effective method is to combine short reading passages with daily speaking practice. This routine does not require hours of study, but it does require consistency and clear priorities. Learners who review new material regularly often retain information better than those who cram once a week. Teachers frequently point out that active practice is more valuable than passive review. With useful phrases like 'duration', 'detect effectively', and 'highlight effectively', students can make stronger connections across reading, listening, speaking, and writing. In addition, learners should record short answers to build fluency and receive feedback from teachers or language partners. A well-designed routine makes it easier to maintain motivation when work and family responsibilities compete for attention. Over several weeks, small actions can produce noticeable improvement in confidence and accuracy on both TOEFL and IELTS tasks.

中文翻譯：許多成年學習者在準備國際考試時面臨共同挑戰：時間有限。為此，他們需要一個適合忙碌行程的實用方法。一種有效方法是結合短篇閱讀與每日口說練習。這個過程不需要長時間學習，但需要持續性。經常複習新材料的學習者往往比每週死背一次的人更能保留資訊。教師常強調主動練習比被動複習更有價值。有了清楚策略與務實目標，學生能在四項技能上穩定進步。幾週下來，小行動能帶來自信與準確度的顯著提升。

跟讀練習（3 句）

第 1 句

Many adult learners face a common challenge when preparing for international exams: limited time.

發音提示：注意功能詞的連音與重音位置，先慢速再加速。

跟讀步驟：先聽一次，再逐句跟讀，最後不看文字朗讀。

第 2 句

To address this, they need a practical system that fits a busy schedule and supports steady review.

發音提示：留意 and、to、of 等虛詞的弱化發音。

跟讀步驟：先慢速跟讀兩遍，再加速至正常語速。

第 3 句

Today's vocabulary includes terms such as 'invest in context', 'competence for writing', 'framework', and 'appropriate evidence', which can help learners talk about study habits more precisely.

發音提示：句尾語調略下降，表示陳述句結束。

跟讀步驟：分段練習後，最後整句連貫朗讀一次。

TOEFL 技能訓練

請依今日所學完成一題 TOEFL 導向練習，口說 45 秒或寫 3–4 句。

題目：What can be inferred about effective exam preparation from the passage?

架構：I believe ___. One reason is that ___. For example, ___. As a result, ___.

範例：I believe daily practice is essential. One reason is that it builds invest in context over time. For example, I review vocabulary every morning before work. As a result, I feel more prepared for academic tasks.

每日測驗（含答案）

Q1. Which definition best matches 'invest in context'?

  • A. 與「投資」相關的常用片語
  • B. 與「能力
  • C. 架構
  • D. 與「適當的」相關的常用片語

答案：A — 今日單字 invest in context 的解釋為「與「投資」相關的常用片語」。

Q2. What is the main idea of today's reading?

  • A. Effective learning requires consistent, structured practice.
  • B. Cramming once a week is the best method.
  • C. Vocabulary lists alone guarantee a high score.
  • D. Test preparation should avoid speaking practice.

答案：A — 文章強調有限時間下，持續且結構化的練習才能帶來進步。

Q3. Which sentence uses today's grammar pattern correctly?

  • A. I like English. Because it is useful.
  • B. In my opinion, practice helps. One reason is that it builds fluency.
  • C. Practice good and fun.
  • D. English hard but I try.

答案：B — 選項 B 正確運用 In my opinion... One reason is that... 句型。

祝學習順利！明日 09:00 將寄送下一課。
